creator: sbz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Anton,

This patch LGTM. I would like to avoid to add a new patch into FILESDIR to stay closer to upstream but I found the reported issue upstream [1], so I think we can't avoid this patch addition because the 1.8.0 release was done before the fix [2]

[1] https://github.com/libssh2/libssh2/issues/150
[2] https://github.com/libssh2/libssh2/commit/ced924b78a40126606797ef57a74066eb3b4b83f
